content: Execute mandatory testing gate - run all tests to verify 100% pass rate
Conduct take stock assessment of progress toward surpassing R
Perform mandatory code audit using zen mcp tools
Plan next sprint based on assessment and audit results
CRITICAL: Fix hardcoded n_stats in RegularizedBootstrapStatistic to prevent panics
HIGH: Implement reproducible parallel bootstrap with proper seeding
Implement direct R vs Rust comparative benchmarking infrastructure
Integrate formula crate into stats_models for R-style API
Expand oracle test coverage to include GLM and regularization
